title: Secure Data Deletion Request
insertEmailPhone: Insert your Email or your cellphone number
eraseDataConfirmation: Are you absolutely sure you want to erase your data?
eraseDataDescription1: This action is permanent and cannot be undone.
eraseDataDescription2: By confirming this request, all personal data associated with your email/phone number will be permanently removed from our systems.
eraseDataDescription3: This includes any records used for communication purposes.
eraseDataDescription4: As a result, you may no longer receive important messages, including updates, service alerts, or utility-related notifications.
eraseDataDescription5: I have read and understood the consequences and want to proceed with erasing all of my data.
enterOTPPlaceholder: Enter the OTP sent to your email/phone
otpVerificationFailed: OTP verification failed. Please try again.
dataDeletionBegins: We have received your request to delete your data. We will notify you via an email on completion.
errorMessage: Oops! Something went wrong. Please try again.
